content.body:
Integration: temp repo with README + go.mod + Go code + git commits
produces >= 15 memories across all extractors with correct provenance.
Dry-run: produces drafts but does not write cache manifest.
Incremental: second run skips unchanged files; --refresh re-scans all.
Performance: 500-file repo bootstraps in under 60 seconds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: test(cartographer): add integration, dry-run, cache, and performance tests
content.summary:
add integration, dry-run, cache, and performance tests. Integration: temp repo with README + go.mod + Go code + git commits
produces >= 15 memories across all extractors with correct provenance.
